problem: Can superconductivity be achieved at room temperature — what material structure?
mechanism: Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue
hypothesis: Combining Electromagnetic induction in moving biological tissue with current standard of care could unlock function improves by addressing existing therapies only treat symptoms.

experiment.protocol: Materials characterization (XRD, SEM) with 12 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: The impediment to action advances action. What stands in the way becomes the way. — Marcus Aurelius
